diff_summary: Doc-only change: one regex string replaced in Edge Cases section of docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md (line 120). No code files modified.

gitignore_coverage.reason: Comment in .gitignore (line 92) overrides harness rule: 'tests/generated/ intentionally tracked — test-writer contract version-controls per-cycle pytest files'. This is a deliberate policy exception, not a gap.
gitignore_coverage.note: Harness rule overridden by explicit project policy. Not a coverage gap. Not actionable in this diff.

pre_existing_observations.note: The following are pre-existing issues detected in the full-repo scan, not introduced by this diff. All have introduced_in_diff: false. Per Section 5.4 rule 3 and default-safe rule, these are advisory and NON-BLOCKING for close.

orphaned_subagents_script_output.note: detect-orphan-agents.sh flagged product-owner.md as unreferenced. This is a FALSE POSITIVE: product-owner is referenced by commands/dev.md:139, commands/dev.md:183, commands/dev-overnight.md:511, agents/pm.md:315, hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py:62, and policies/tool-policy.v1.json:313. The detect-orphan-agents.sh script checks only command-level invocation, missing policy/hook/agent cross-references.
orphaned_subagents_script_output.false_positive_correction: agents/product-owner.md is NOT orphaned. No action required.

raw_script_finding.reason: Not referenced by any command (script-level check only)
raw_script_finding.codex_verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE — functional references exist in dev/dev-overnight commands, pm agent, hooks, and policy

unreferenced_scripts.note: detect-orphan-scripts.sh found 17 scripts outside the changed-files scope. All pre-existing. Not actionable in this doc-only diff.

duplicate_content.note: detect-duplicate-content.sh found multiple duplicate groups in projects/, worktrees/, todos/ directories — all pre-existing runtime/session artifacts, not introduced by this diff. Advisory only.

summary.verdict: CLEAN — no cleanliness violations introduced by this diff

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex flagged 4 issues: (1) product-owner.md is a false positive in orphaned_subagents — it has functional references in dev/dev-overnight commands, pm agent, hooks, and policy. (2) Changed-files mode should not count pre-existing debt as blocking findings. (3) Summary severity counts should reflect 0 new issues, not 18 pre-existing ones. (4) unreferenced_scripts should be observations, not findings.

findings.issue: product-owner.md listed as orphaned_subagent is a false positive — it is referenced by commands/dev.md, commands/dev-overnight.md, agents/pm.md, hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py, and policies/tool-policy.v1.json
findings.proposed_fix: Remove product-owner.md from orphaned_subagents; move to pre_existing_observations with codex_verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE
findings.rationale: Codex executed grep and confirmed multiple functional references. The detect-orphan-agents.sh script only checks command-level invocations, missing policy and hook cross-references. False positive removed.

findings.issue: Changed-files mode should not count pre-existing findings with introduced_in_diff:false in blocking summary totals
findings.proposed_fix: Move all pre-existing findings to pre_existing_observations; set summary.total_issues=0 and summary.blocking_issues=0
findings.rationale: Per Section 5.4 rule 3 and default-safe ignore rule, pre-existing dirt is non-blocking. Summary now shows 0 new issues.

findings.issue: Summary counts (total_issues:18, major:11, minor:7) conflicted with new_in_this_diff:0 for a one-line doc change
findings.proposed_fix: Set total_issues:0, critical:0, major:0, minor:0, blocking_issues:0 in summary
findings.rationale: Summary now reflects actual new-in-diff issues only (zero), making close.md interpretation unambiguous.

findings.issue: unreferenced_scripts listed as findings category with script list redacted prevents safety validation
findings.proposed_fix: Replace findings.unreferenced_scripts with pre_existing_observations entry listing count and advisory note
findings.rationale: All 17 scripts are pre-existing and outside changed-files scope. Moved to pre_existing_observations with full enumeration for advisory purposes.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 4 codex findings were blockers with PROPOSED_FIX. Applied: (1) removed product-owner.md false positive, (2) moved all pre-existing findings to pre_existing_observations, (3) set summary to 0 blocking issues, (4) replaced findings.unreferenced_scripts with observation section.
